creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi mrT,
This occurs because net/remmina-plugins is a meta port - it does not actually install any files itself, it merely depends on other ports (such as net/remmina-plugin-nx).
Therefore, when you run make, it installs all of the dependencies, which are the actual remmina plugins, in preparation for its own build (which is nothing).

If you only want to test build the remmina plugins, you should do it to the individual plugins:
$ cd /usr/ports/net/remmina/plugin/nx
$ make

Regards,
Ben
